top_signals.title: France Unveils New Cuts as Weaker Growth Imperils Deficit Goal
top_signals.summary: France said it would make €3 billion ($3.4 billion) of additional budget cuts this year as it struggles to keep on track with narrowing the budget shortfall after weaker economic activity threatened its plans.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: French far-right leader Le Pen cleared to run for president
top_signals.summary: Appeals court shortens sentence for embezzlement but electronic monitoring could hinder her ability to campaign
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: London IPO candidate CFC hires ex-Direct Line chief as new boss
top_signals.summary: Private equity-backed business is exploring strategic options including a potential listing on the LSE
